privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a new IP location mapping named 'Austin Innovation Hub' with description 'New R&D Facility - Bldg 4' and IP range from 10.55.0.0 to 10.55.255.255. All these values are purely synthetic and provided directly in the task description. The final screenshot is expected to be saved to C:\workspace\tasks\configure_ip_location_mapping\final_screenshot.png.
